name: rust-metadata-action
description: GitHub action to retrieve metadata, including crates, features, and other relevant information of the Rust project

scripts.all: npm run fmt && npm run build && npm test
scripts.fmt: prettier --write index.js lib.js tests/*.js package.json action.yml .github/dependabot.yml .github/workflows/*.yml
scripts.check: prettier --check index.js lib.js tests/*.js package.json action.yml .github/dependabot.yml .github/workflows/*.yml

author: Sergey Vilgelm <sergey@vilgelm.com> (https://vilgelm.com)
